templates.name: Modern Indian Elegance
templates.vibe_check: Rich walnut woods, subtle brass accents, and warm jewel-toned upholstery.
templates.description: This design bridges rich cultural heritage with the demands of contemporary urban living. Utilizes a sturdy L-shaped sectional sofa in a warm jewel tone upholstered in high-performance, stain-resistant fabric. The focal point is a solid walnut or teak wood coffee table. Subtle brass accents through sleek floor lamps, closed wooden cabinets, and a washable traditional motif rug.

templates.name: Warm Minimalist
templates.vibe_check: Clutter-free spaces, soft curved furniture, and earthy beige or terracotta tones.
templates.description: Designed for the busy urban professional seeking calm. Soft, curved furniture like a low-profile beige or terracotta sofa. Floating media consoles free up floor space. Earthy tones and warm whites reflect natural light in compact flats. One or two large impactful art pieces instead of numerous small decor items.

templates.name: Contemporary Luxe
templates.vibe_check: High-gloss marble, fluted wall panels, and gold or champagne metallic trims.
templates.description: Caters to the aspirational homeowner making a strong visual statement. Mimics a premium hotel lobby. Plush neutral velvet sofa, fluted wood panels or metallic wallpapers behind the TV, nesting tables with gold-tinted frames and faux-marble tops, layered lighting with cove lighting and a geometric chandelier.

templates.name: Mid-Century Modern
templates.vibe_check: Tapered wooden legs, mustard accents, and clean functional lines.
templates.description: Loved by younger first-time homebuyers — tapered legs lift furniture off the ground, creating an illusion of more space. Streamlined tufted three-seater sofa in mustard yellow or deep forest green. Medium-to-dark walnut sideboards. Geometric throw pillows and rugs. Photographs beautifully.

templates.name: Japandi (Zen & Wood)
templates.vibe_check: Light oak, slatted wall dividers, and calming oatmeal fabrics.
templates.description: Fusion of Japanese minimalism and Scandinavian functionality. Extensive light oak or ash wood. Low-slung fabric sofas in oatmeal or soft grey. Vertical slatted wood room dividers separate areas while letting light flow. Wabi-sabi ceramics, dried branches, raw linen curtains. Promotes mindfulness.

templates.name: 5-Star Hotel Vibe
templates.vibe_check: Massive upholstered headboards, plush velvet, and warm cove lighting.
templates.description: Transforms the primary bedroom into a luxury retreat. A statement upholstered headboard in deep velvet or bouclé spans the full wall. Recessed cove lighting bathes the room in warm, soft light. Floor-to-ceiling sheer curtains layered with blackout drapes. The bed is dressed in crisp white linens with a chunky knit throw.

templates.name: Modern Minimalist
templates.vibe_check: Handleless wardrobes, floating side tables, and crisp white linens.
templates.description: Clutter-free sanctuary built around handleless wardrobes that disappear into the wall. A platform bed with no footboard, floating side tables, and a singular pendant light per side. Palette stays in soft greys and crisp whites. The room feels expansive even in compact urban flats.

templates.name: Warm & Earthy
templates.vibe_check: Baked clay tones, linen fabrics, and a sun-drenched feel.
templates.description: Soft baked-clay walls or accent surfaces with terracotta and ochre layered through bedding and curtains. Rough-finished linen sheets, raw wood bedside tables, and woven baskets for storage. Warm-tone task lighting and a single large-format botanical print as the focal art.

templates.name: Smart Space-Saver
templates.vibe_check: Integrated study desk, hidden storage bed, and efficient zoning.
templates.description: Built for the compact apartment. A storage bed with hydraulic lift conceals seasonal items. A wall-mounted study desk folds away. Mirrored wardrobe fronts double the perceived room size. Wall-hung bedside shelves replace bulky tables. Every centimetre is earning its keep.

templates.name: Modern Royal Indian
templates.vibe_check: Four-poster bed, silk fabrics, and intricate floral wallpaper accents.
templates.description: A modern take on royal Indian heritage. A slim four-poster bed in dark wood, dressed in silk and brocade textiles. One accent wall in floral wallpaper or hand-painted mural. Brass-accented bedside lamps and a richly patterned dhurrie at the foot of the bed.

templates.name: Sleek & Seamless (Handleless)
templates.vibe_check: Seamless gloss cabinets, integrated appliances, and easy-clean surfaces.
templates.description: Push-to-open handleless cabinets in high-gloss acrylic or PU finish. Built-in chimney, microwave, and oven flush with the cabinetry. Engineered quartz countertops resist Indian masala stains. Under-cabinet LED strip lighting and a bright accent backsplash complete the look.

templates.name: Classic Wood Finish
templates.vibe_check: Solid teak veneer, brass hardware, and warm granite countertops.
templates.description: Anchored in solid teak or teak-veneer cabinetry with intricate brass cup handles. Warm granite or quartzite countertops with a polished or leathered finish. A traditional motif tile backsplash adds heritage character. Brass pendants over the breakfast counter.

templates.name: Modern Two-Tone
templates.vibe_check: Navy lower cabinets, crisp white uppers, and bright quartz top.
templates.description: Deep navy blue lowers ground the kitchen while crisp white uppers reflect light. A bright quartz countertop runs across both. Brushed nickel handles and pendants pull the contrast together. Open shelving on a single wall displays curated ceramic and glassware.

templates.name: Premium Marble Look
templates.vibe_check: Marble-veined backsplashes, profile lighting, and gold accents.
templates.description: Floor-to-ceiling Italian marble or marble-look porcelain runs as the backsplash and continues onto the countertop. Profile lighting under the wall cabinets washes the marble in warm light. Brushed gold tapware and cabinet hardware nod to luxury without overpowering.

templates.name: Smart Modular Efficiency
templates.vibe_check: Floor-to-ceiling storage, magic pull-outs, and optimised counters.
templates.description: Engineered for Indian cooking realities — tall pantry units, magic-corner pull-outs, dedicated atta storage, and a built-in chimney. Cabinets reach the ceiling so nothing gathers grease on top. A small breakfast counter doubles as prep space. Every inch is functional.

templates.name: Spa-Like Retreat
templates.vibe_check: Earthy stone-finish tiles, rain shower, and warm cove lighting.
templates.description: Earthy stone-finish porcelain tiles wrap floors and walls. A frameless walk-in shower with overhead rain head and recessed niche. Warm cove lighting around the mirror and ceiling perimeter. A single hung indoor plant and a teak duckboard make it feel like a hotel spa.

templates.name: Classic Marble Elegance
templates.vibe_check: Italian marble, brass fixtures, and a backlit vanity mirror.
templates.description: High-gloss Italian marble or marble-look slabs from floor to ceiling. Polished brass tapware and a tall slim mirror with backlight halo. A floating vanity with veined stone top. Crystal sconces flank the mirror. Built for the homeowner who wants the bathroom to feel like a jewel box.

templates.name: Clean & Neutral (Contemporary)
templates.vibe_check: Beige or soft grey tiles, floating vanity, and easy-to-wipe lines.
templates.description: Large-format beige or soft grey vitrified tiles. A floating vanity in matte laminate with a thin engineered stone top. A frameless mirror, simple matte black tapware, and a glass shower partition. The palette is intentionally quiet — designed to age well and pair with anything.

templates.name: Space-Saving Modern
templates.vibe_check: Wall-hung commodes, mirror-front storage, and bright space-expanding light.
templates.description: Built for the 30-square-foot Indian bathroom. Wall-hung commode and vanity free up floor space for cleaning. Storage hides behind a mirror cabinet. Niche shelves carved into the shower wall. Bright cool-white lighting and a glass partition keep the room feeling open.

templates.name: Warm Stone & Earth
templates.vibe_check: Travertine textures, terracotta tones, and aged copper hardware.
templates.description: Travertine-look porcelain wraps the wet zone with soft, warm character. Terracotta accent tiles in a niche or feature wall. Aged copper or antique brass tapware. A wood-grain laminate vanity grounds the warmth. The room feels lived-in and Mediterranean.

templates.name: Traditional Carved Wood
templates.vibe_check: Carved teak table, brass tableware, and traditional Indian artwork.
templates.description: A heirloom-feel rectangular dining table in deep-stained teak with hand-carved leg detail. Tall-back upholstered chairs in jewel-toned fabric. A traditional brass chandelier or pendant cluster overhead. A carved sideboard for crockery. Walls accented with a Tanjore painting or block-print art.

templates.name: Open Concept Dining
templates.vibe_check: Flows into the living area, matching wood tones, and low-profile seating.
templates.description: The dining flows seamlessly out of the living room — same flooring, complementary wood tones in the table and console. A tighter pendant zone visually anchors the area without walls. Low-back chairs keep sightlines open. A console along one wall stores serving ware.

templates.name: Modern Glass & Glam
templates.vibe_check: Tinted glass top, gold metallic base, and plush velvet chairs.
templates.description: A smoked or bronze-tinted glass tabletop on a sculptural gold or brass base. Velvet upholstered chairs in deep emerald, navy, or burgundy. A modern cluster chandelier or a single dramatic statement light. A mirrored or marble buffet completes the glamour.

templates.name: Simple & Warm Wood
templates.vibe_check: Light oak table, upholstered chairs, and a singular pendant light.
templates.description: A clean-lined light oak or ash table with subtle chamfered edges. Upholstered linen chairs in oatmeal or warm grey. A single oversized rattan or paper pendant overhead. The room is intentionally restrained — meant for everyday family meals, not occasions.

templates.name: Cozy Corner Dining
templates.vibe_check: Banquette seating, round bistro table, and warm wall-mounted sconces.
templates.description: A built-in upholstered banquette tucks into a corner with chairs on the open side, doubling space efficiency. A round bistro table prevents corner-jamming. Warm wall sconces replace pendant lights overhead. Storage drawers hide under the banquette. Perfect for compact apartments.

templates.name: The Executive Setup
templates.vibe_check: Dark wood executive desk, leather chair, and built-in bookshelf.
templates.description: A heavy mahogany or walnut executive desk centered on a feature wall. A high-back tan or oxblood leather chair. Built-in bookshelves either side, lit with subtle warm strip lighting. A tufted leather guest chair across the desk. Designed for serious work and weighty video calls.

templates.name: Smart Wall Desk (Compact)
templates.vibe_check: Fold-out wall desk, vertical shelves, and optimised corners.
templates.description: A wall-mounted floating desk that folds flat when not in use. Vertical pegboard or slat-wall above for cables and accessories. A single ergonomic chair tucks underneath. Designed to disappear into a bedroom or living-room corner without permanent footprint.

templates.name: Nature-Inspired Office
templates.vibe_check: Desk facing natural light, abundant plants, and raw wood textures.
templates.description: Desk positioned to face a window with natural light. A live-edge wood desktop on slim metal legs. A wall of mixed indoor plants — ferns, monstera, snake plants. Raw linen curtains diffuse harsh sun. A warm wool rug grounds the space. Built to reduce work-from-home stress.

templates.name: Distraction-Free Zone
templates.vibe_check: White floating desk, hidden cables, and neutral walls.
templates.description: A wall-to-wall white floating desk with all cables run inside the wall or in a covered tray. Walls in flat oatmeal or pale grey — no art on the work-facing wall. A single ergonomic mesh chair. Acoustic felt panels behind the monitor absorb echo for video calls.

templates.name: The Reading Room
templates.vibe_check: Floor-to-ceiling bookshelves, an armchair, and warm brass task lamps.
templates.description: A small room or corner converted into a personal library. Floor-to-ceiling shelving in dark wood, crammed with books and small objects. A deep armchair with a side table and brass adjustable task lamp. A footstool, a single warm rug, and heavy curtains. Built for slow afternoons.

templates.name: Neon Cyberpunk
templates.vibe_check: RGB LED strips, dark walls, and a multi-monitor battle station.
templates.description: Matte black or graphite walls absorb glare. RGB LED strips trace the ceiling perimeter, the desk underside, and the back of the monitors. A triple-monitor battle station on a curved gaming desk. A racing-style chair in red or purple. Hexagonal LED wall panels behind for the camera-on streamer aesthetic.

templates.name: Minimalist Setup
templates.vibe_check: Clean white desk, hidden cables, and soft ambient backlighting.
templates.description: A pristine white desk with all peripherals colour-matched. Cables routed through a single grommet and hidden inside the desk channel. Soft warm-white bias lighting behind the monitor. A single accent plant. The setup looks like a product shot — calm, focused, on-camera ready.

templates.name: Console Lounge
templates.vibe_check: Wall-mounted TV, plush recliners, and acoustic wall panels.
templates.description: Built around the couch, not the desk. A massive wall-mounted TV with acoustic felt panels framing it. Plush reclining seats or oversized bean bags. Console controllers stored in a sleek media console. Soft ambient lighting and blackout curtains for daytime sessions.

templates.name: Streamer Studio
templates.vibe_check: Acoustic foam panels, ring lights, and an aesthetic background shelf.
templates.description: Camera-first design. Hexagonal acoustic foam panels in a brand-aligned colour. A professional ring light or softbox just off-camera. A floating shelf behind the streamer, styled with curated objects, plants, and LED accents. The whole room is composed for the viewer's framing, not the streamer's eyes.

templates.name: Immersive Simulator
templates.vibe_check: Curved ultra-wide setup, racing rig, and lights synced to the screen.
templates.description: A curved 49-inch ultra-wide monitor or triple-screen setup mounted on a sim racing rig. Force-feedback wheel and pedals. Smart lights around the room sync colour to the screen content. Optional VR headset stand. Built for flight sims, racing, and full-immersion play sessions.

templates.name: Modern Tech Hub
templates.vibe_check: Open plan, sound-proof glass partitions, and vibrant breakout zones.
templates.description: An open-plan workspace with hot-desks, glass-walled meeting rooms for sound isolation, and colourful breakout zones with bean bags and standing-height tables. Acoustic ceiling panels in playful colours absorb noise. Designed to attract talent — looks great on Instagram tours.

templates.name: Premium Executive
templates.vibe_check: Dark wood paneling, leather seating, and panoramic window views.
templates.description: Built for the C-suite floor. Floor-to-ceiling dark wood paneling, full-grain leather seating, a slab walnut conference table, and panoramic windows. A subtle metallic ceiling treatment, recessed warm lighting, and a curated art wall. Quiet, weighty, intentional.

templates.name: Industrial Startup
templates.vibe_check: Exposed ceiling ducts, polished concrete floors, and standing desks.
templates.description: Raw industrial bones. Exposed HVAC ducts and ceiling joists, polished concrete floors, and warehouse-style metal-frame windows. Collaborative standing desks in clusters. Whiteboard walls everywhere. A coffee bar with reclaimed-wood counter. The space says 'we ship'.

templates.name: Biophilic Corporate
templates.vibe_check: Living green walls, natural light, and warm wood accents.
templates.description: A living plant wall is the focal piece in reception. Floor-to-ceiling glass maximises natural light. Workstations in warm-toned wood laminate. A central atrium with hanging planters. Designed to reduce employee stress and the building's carbon impact in equal measure.

templates.name: Collaborative Co-working
templates.vibe_check: Hot desks, colourful privacy pods, and café-style lounge areas.
templates.description: Hot-desking is the default. Colourful upholstered acoustic pods give private zones for calls. Café-style lounge with high stools and laptop bars. A community pantry and games corner. Bright pendant lighting and bold brand-coloured accents on signage and feature walls.

templates.name: Urban Balcony Oasis
templates.vibe_check: Vertical garden walls, rattan seating, and warm fairy string lights.
templates.description: A vertical green wall on the longest balcony face transforms a 4x8 ft slab into a pocket forest. A small rattan bistro table with two chairs. Warm fairy string lights overhead create evening atmosphere. Trailing plants spill over the railing. Built for the apartment dweller's golden hour.

templates.name: Tropical Patio
templates.vibe_check: Large palms, teak loungers, and washable outdoor rugs.
templates.description: A jungle-on-tile feel with large palms (areca, kentia, ravenala) framing the seating zone. Teak loungers with washable bouclé cushions. A bold botanical-print outdoor rug. Bamboo blinds for privacy and shade. Built for villa balconies and ground-floor terraces.

templates.name: Modern Terrace
templates.vibe_check: Frameless glass railings, sleek metal dining set, and a built-in BBQ counter.
templates.description: A clean architectural terrace — frameless glass railings preserve the view. Sleek powder-coated aluminium dining set with weatherproof cushions. A built-in BBQ counter or pizza oven on one wall. String lights or recessed deck lighting at floor level. Built for entertaining.

templates.name: Boho Retreat
templates.vibe_check: Macramé hammocks, floor cushions, and overhead string lights.
templates.description: A relaxed bohemian outdoor lounge. Macramé hammocks slung between corners, layered floor cushions on a low platform, and a hanging chair in a sunny corner. Warm string lights criss-cross overhead. Pots of trailing flowers and herbs scattered about. Built for slow weekend mornings.

templates.name: Entertainer's Deck
templates.vibe_check: Treated wooden decking, an outdoor bar, and a weather-resistant sectional.
templates.description: A composite or treated-wood deck floor over the existing surface. A weatherproof sectional sofa with a low coffee table. A standing outdoor bar counter with two stools. Recessed deck lighting, a portable speaker setup, and a small fire-feature for cool evenings. Built for parties.

templates.name: Modern Contemporary
templates.vibe_check: Clean geometric lines, large glass windows, and stark white plaster.
templates.description: A two-or-three-storey facade defined by clean rectangular volumes. Stark white plaster contrasts with full-height glass windows. A vertical louvered timber feature near the entry softens the geometry. Concealed downlights graze the facade at night. Built for the modern Indian villa.

templates.name: Earthy & Brick
templates.vibe_check: Exposed brick facade, wooden window louvers, and natural stone cladding.
templates.description: Exposed clay brick or brick-clad walls warm the facade. Wooden vertical louvers shade key windows. Natural stone cladding (Kota, Dholpur) on the boundary wall and entrance plinth. Warm down-lighting at the canopy and at planted beds. Earthy and rooted in Indian context.

templates.name: Tropical Villa
templates.vibe_check: Overhanging eaves, abundant balcony greenery, and wooden privacy screens.
templates.description: Deep overhanging eaves protect from monsoon rain and harsh sun. Generous balconies layered with planters and creepers. Wooden privacy screens on bedrooms. Sloped tile roof in a warm terracotta. The facade reads as breezy, shaded, and tropical — coastal Karnataka or Goa villa.

templates.name: Mid-Century Exterior
templates.vibe_check: Asymmetrical roofline, breeze blocks, and a coloured front door.
templates.description: Flat or asymmetrical pitched roofline. Decorative breeze-block screens (jaali) for ventilation and shade. A bold coloured front door — mustard, teal, or oxblood. Stone or wood vertical paneling on a single wall. Crisp white plaster elsewhere. Reads retro and confident.

templates.name: Luxury Marble & Stone
templates.vibe_check: Travertine cladding, automated brass gate, and statement entry lighting.
templates.description: A premium villa facade clad in honed travertine or Italian marble. A solid wood and brass automated gate. Bronze address numbers. Linear strip downlighting along the facade joints at night. Floor-to-ceiling glass at the entry foyer reveals a chandelier. Built to impress on the first drive-up.
